system_description: A high-availability cloud-native web application for e-commerce, deployed on AWS with Kubernetes, using microservices architecture and a PostgreSQL database. Handles sensitive customer data and payment processing.
threat_intelligence: Recent reports indicate increased phishing attacks targeting cloud credentials.
Known vulnerabilities in PostgreSQL versions older than 14.x (CVE-2023-XXXX) are being actively exploited.
DDoS attacks targeting e-commerce platforms are on the rise during holiday seasons.
Insider threat is a concern due to sensitive data access by employees.
